headline: Discover which S&P500 stocks are making waves on Monday.
summary: Join us in exploring the top gainers and losers within the S&P500 index one hour before the close of the markets on Monday as we examine the latest happenings in today's session.

headline: NinjaOne Named a Customers' Choice in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights Voice of the Customer for Endpoint Management Tools
summary: AUSTIN, Texas, July 13, 2026--NinjaOne®, unifying IT to simplify work, today announced it has been recognized as a Customers' Choice for Endpoint Management Tools in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights™ Voice of the Customer Report. NinjaOne has an Overall Rating of 4.7 out of 5 in the Endpoint Management Tools Voice of the Customer on Gartner Peer Insights™ as of April 2026. headline: SoundHound AI Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Conversational AI Platforms
summary: SANTA CLARA, Calif., July 13, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- SoundHound AI, Inc. (Nasdaq: SOUN), a global leader in voice and agentic AI, today announced it has been positioned by Gartner as a Leader in the Magic Quadrant for Conversational AI Platforms.
